content:
Optimize jet install true-cold performance. Current: 45.7s for 1886 packages (pnpm: 11.3s). Target: <20s.

### Bottlenecks
1. Sync disk cache I/O blocks async runtime during BFS metadata resolution
2. BFS level serialization — each level waits for previous to complete before starting fetches
3. No speculative prefetch for common transitive deps
